title: hieracium praecox subsp. verlotii
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. verlotii, also known as the early hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to East Asia, particularly in China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium praecox subsp. verlotii include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
